name: Carrot Raisin Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the gelatin in boiling water.
2. Stir in the raisins until combined.
3. Mix the orange juice and enough ice cubes to make 1 1/4 cups.
4. Add this mixture to the gelatin-raisin combination and stir until slightly thickened.
5. Remove any unmelted ice.
6. Stir in the shredded carrots.
7. Spoon the salad into individual dishes or a small serving bowl.
8. Refrigerate until firm, about 2 hours.
DIABETIC EXCHANGE (per serving): 1/2 fruit; also 40 calories'65mg sodium, 0mg cholesterol, 0gm fat, 8g carbohydrate, 2gm protein.
